implementation_summary: Created chatHandler.ts (kind-9) and reactionHandler.ts (kind-7) under app/src/lib/marmot/handlers/. Wired both in registerHandlers.ts via createChatHandler/createReactionHandler factories. Added buildDispatcher subscription in MarmotContext.subscribeNewGroups(), storing the combined unsubscribe. Removed the CHAT_MESSAGE_KIND branch (lines 702-726) and kind-7 branch (lines 781-814) from MarmotContext onApplicationMessage callback, and removed the own-send guard (if senderPubkey === pubkeyHex return). Removed the group.on('applicationMessage') listener and handler body from ChatStoreContext; the context is now selection-only + outbound. Added __quizzlTest.onChatIdbWrite hook to chatPersistence.appendMessage. Added onChatIdbWrite type to rumor-counter.ts __quizzlTest interface.

ac_verification.AC-AR-1: grep -r "group.on('applicationMessage'" app/src/ returns exactly 1 file: applicationRumorDispatcher.ts
ac_verification.AC-AR-3: No CHAT_MESSAGE_KIND or kind-7 literal comparisons in MarmotContext.tsx or ChatStoreContext.tsx
ac_verification.AC-AR-4: Only registerHandlers.ts imports from handlers/ directory

retrospective.harder_than_needed: The MarmotContext callback still uses `senderPubkey` in POLL branches after removing the own-send guard — required careful surgery to avoid breaking the remaining variable reference. The onApplicationMessage callback being one large if-else-if block means any removal must account for variable scoping across all branches. The `appendMessage` import in MarmotContext also needed replacement since it was embedded in a dynamic import inside the CHAT_MESSAGE_KIND handler; the story instruction to use top-level imports required restructuring the import strategy.
retrospective.surprised_by: The `getActiveGroupId` field in DispatcherContext is not tracked in MarmotContext at all — it manages all groups equally. The handler logic in chatHandler.ts ends up not using this field for any routing decision (incrementUnread fires for all non-own-send messages regardless of active group). The field is part of the interface for future handlers but MarmotContext passes `() => null` for now.
